pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.4.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.x is required for compatibility with the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping 11 would result in incorrect bytecode or build failures if toolchains enforce the target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency management for de.flapdoodle.embed.mongo to ensure version consistency.
Remove exclusion of junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
